title: Academic Figures MCP Introduction
goal: Create a polished introduction illustration that explains Academic Figures MCP as a workflow-first harness turning scientific input into publication-ready figures through planning, generation, evaluation, and iteration.
visual_direction: editorial, modern, structured, premium, product-intro visual rather than a literal software screenshot

source_context.summary: PMID or academic idea in, structured planning and orchestration in the middle, publication-grade figures out

must_include: central MCP workflow hub with a scientific paper or prompt card entering from the left
three major stages shown around the hub: plan, generate, evaluate
output figure cards or polished medical visuals exiting to the right
subtle orbital links or node connectors suggesting MCP orchestration
clear visual storytelling with almost no tiny text
references: Use deep academic navy, teal, amber, and warm ivory as the main palette
Keep the composition product-grade and readable for README hero usage

prompt_pack.prompt:
## Block 1: TITLE & PURPOSE
title: 'Academic Figures MCP Introduction'
purpose: Create a premium introduction visual for the Academic Figures MCP repository that quickly explains the product story: workflow-first academic figure planning and production for AI agents.

## Block 2: LAYOUT
asset_kind: repo_intro_hero
figure_type: infographic
composition: Wide editorial hero illustration, left-to-right narrative. Left side shows structured scientific inputs such as a PMID card, paper abstract card, or academic concept brief. Center shows an MCP workflow hub. Right side shows polished publication-grade figures leaving the system.

## Block 3: ELEMENTS
repo: academic-figures-mcp
tagline: workflow-first academic figure harness
summary: planning, generation, evaluation, iteration
must_include: incoming paper card; MCP workflow hub; three visible workflow stages plan/generate/evaluate; outgoing polished figure cards; elegant node-link connectors
references: minimal large labels only; no tiny UI text; symbolic communication preferred

## Block 4: COLOR
palette: deep academic navy background, luminous teal workflow links, amber emphasis, warm ivory figure cards
style_preset: repo_intro_editorial
visual_direction: publication-grade, modern, confident, clean, product-intentional, not generic AI slop

## Block 5: TEXT
language: English
text_usage: only a few large short labels if needed; avoid dense paragraphs and small captions

## Block 6: STYLE
style: clean editorial scientific infographic with subtle depth, vector-like clarity, premium README hero art
negative_constraints: avoid screenshots, avoid clutter, avoid photorealism, avoid purple bias, avoid tiny illegible text

## Block 7: SIZE
canvas: 1536x1024
